info.name: ROLLER API
info.description:
Complete collection for ROLLER's REST API and Reporting API.

Setup:
1. Open the Variables tab and paste your API credentials into clientId and clientSecret.
2. Confirm baseUrl is set to https://api.play.roller.app (sandbox) or https://api.roller.app (production).
3. Send the 'Get OAuth token' request first — it will automatically store the access token.
4. All other requests will authenticate automatically using the stored token.

item.name: Get OAuth token
Rest API > Booking Information > Get booking detail

request.description:
Returns detail of a specific booking. The `bookingReference` (i.e. the ROLLER `bookingId`) can be used instead of `uniqueId` as the path parameter.

**Path parameters:**
- `uniqueId` (string, required) — Unique ID of a booking (or bookingReference)

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/rest/operations/get-booking

item.name: Rest API > Booking Information > Search for bookings

query.description: Search on booking name, ticket ID, guest first/last name, email, phone (min 3 chars, optional)
Booking date of booking items on the booking (yyyy-MM-dd, optional)
Session start time in 24hr format — only applies to session products (optional)
Comma separated product IDs — date is required when using this parameter (optional)
Comma separated resource IDs — date is required when using this parameter (optional)

request.description:
Returns basic booking detail for up to 100 of the most recent bookings matching the search criteria. At least one query parameter is required.

**Query parameters:**
- `keywords` (string, optional) — Search on booking name, ticket ID, guest first/last name, email, phone (min 3 chars)
- `date` (string, optional) — Booking date of booking items (yyyy-MM-dd)
- `startTime` (string, optional) — Session start time in 24hr format
- `productIds` (string, optional) — Comma separated product IDs; date is required
- `locationIds` (string, optional) — Comma separated resource IDs; date is required

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/rest/operations/search-bookings

item.name: Rest API > Booking Management > Cancel a booking

body.raw:
{
  "issueRefund": true,         // (required) Whether to refund any booking payments
  "refundType": "CreditCard",   // (required when issueRefund is true) Refund method: CreditCard, Cash, Eftpos, Cheque, BankTransfer, GiftCard, Other
  "refundTransactionId": "UUDJS882993", // Optional transaction ID of the refund
  "refundTransactionDate": "2025-07-01T09:00:00+00:00", // Optional UTC datetime of the refund transaction
  "comments": "Customer called and cancelled their booking." // Optional comments for booking activity
}

request.description:
Cancel a booking and optionally mark it as refunded in a single transaction. Only bookings created via API can be cancelled via API; only future bookings can be cancelled.

**Path parameters:**
- `uniqueId` (string, required) — Unique ID of a booking

**Request body fields:**
- `issueRefund` (boolean, required) — Whether to refund any booking payments
- `refundType` (string, required when issueRefund is true) — Refund method
- `refundTransactionId` (string, optional) — Transaction ID of the refund
- `refundTransactionDate` (string, optional) — UTC datetime of the refund transaction
- `comments` (string, optional) — Comments to add against the refund

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/rest/operations/cancel-booking

item.name: Rest API > Booking Management > Create a booking

body.raw:
{
  "externalId": "UJJSK28374",           // (required) 3rd party booking reference (max 64 chars)
  "customer": {                           // (required) Booking owner / primary contact
    "firstName": "Jane",
    "lastName": "Smith",
    "email": "jane.smith@example.com",
    "contactNumber": "0412345678"
  },
  "items": [                              // (required) Products being purchased
    {
      "productId": 153444,
      "quantity": 2,
      "bookingDate": "2025-07-01"
    }
  ],
  "name": "Sports Group Booking",         // Title of the booking (optional)
  "comments": "Customer has not visited before", // Additional detail (optional, max 500 chars)
  "capacityReservationId": null,          // GUID from capacity reservation API (optional)
  "sendConfirmations": false,             // Send booking confirmation to customer (optional)
  "customerPaysFees": false,              // Apply fees configured in ROLLER (optional)
  "payments": [],                         // Initial payments for the booking (optional)
  "discounts": [],                        // Discount codes or custom discounts (optional)
  "giftCards": [],                        // Gift cards applied to the booking (optional)
  "metadata": {                           // User-defined key-value pairs, up to 20 entries (optional)
    "reservationSource": "partner-portal"
  }
}

request.description:
Create a booking in ROLLER and optionally add an associated payment record. Guest records are automatically created or matched on email.

**Request body fields:**
- `externalId` (string, required) — 3rd party booking reference (max 64 chars)
- `customer` (object, required) — Booking owner / primary contact
- `items` (array, required) — Products being purchased
- `name` (string, optional) — Title of the booking
- `comments` (string, optional) — Additional detail (max 500 chars)
- `capacityReservationId` (string, optional) — GUID from capacity reservation API
- `sendConfirmations` (boolean, optional) — Send booking confirmation to customer
- `customerPaysFees` (boolean, optional) — Apply ROLLER fees
- `payments` (array, optional) — Initial payments
- `discounts` (array, optional) — Discount codes or custom discounts
- `giftCards` (array, optional) — Gift cards applied
- `metadata` (object, optional) — User-defined key-value pairs (up to 20 entries)

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/rest/operations/create-booking

item.name: Rest API > Booking Management > Create draft booking

body.raw:
{
  "externalId": "UJJSK28374",           // (required) 3rd party booking reference
  "customer": {                           // (required) Booking owner / primary contact
    "firstName": "Jane",
    "lastName": "Smith",
    "email": "jane.smith@example.com",
    "contactNumber": "0412345678"
  },
  "items": [                              // (required) Products being purchased
    {
      "productId": 153444,
      "quantity": 2,
      "bookingDate": "2025-07-01"
    }
  ],
  "name": "Sports Group Booking",         // Title of the booking (optional)
  "comments": "Customer has not visited before", // Additional detail (optional)
  "capacityReservationId": null,          // GUID from capacity reservation API (optional)
  "sendConfirmations": false,             // Send booking confirmation to customer (optional)
  "customerPaysFees": false,              // Apply fees configured in ROLLER (optional)
  "discounts": [],                        // Discount codes (optional)
  "giftCards": [],                        // Gift cards applied (optional)
  "metadata": {}                          // User-defined key-value pairs (optional)
}

request.description:
Create a draft booking with discounts and gift card payments, then receive back booking cost information and a secure payment JWT to process payment.

**Request body fields:**
- `externalId` (string, required) — 3rd party booking reference
- `customer` (object, required) — Booking owner / primary contact
- `items` (array, required) — Products being purchased
- `name` (string, optional) — Title of the booking
- `comments` (string, optional) — Additional detail
- `capacityReservationId` (string, optional) — GUID from capacity reservation API
- `sendConfirmations` (boolean, optional) — Send booking confirmation
- `customerPaysFees` (boolean, optional) — Apply ROLLER fees
- `discounts` (array, optional) — Discount codes
- `giftCards` (array, optional) — Gift cards
- `metadata` (object, optional) — User-defined key-value pairs

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/rest/operations/create-draft-booking

item.name: Rest API > Booking Management > Delete a booking

request.description:
Delete a booking along with all associated transaction records. Only bookings created via the API can be deleted; only future bookings can be deleted; cancelled bookings cannot be deleted.

**Path parameters:**
- `uniqueId` (string, required) — Unique ID of a booking

**Request body fields:**
- `comments` (string, optional) — Reason for deleting the booking

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/rest/operations/delete-booking

item.name: Rest API > Booking Management > Publish draft booking (no payment)

request.description:
Publish a draft booking that does not require any payment. Only bookings with an owing amount of 0.0 can be published this way.

**Request body fields:**
- `uniqueId` (string, required) — Unique ID of the draft booking to publish (from Create Draft Booking response)

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/rest/operations/publish-draft-booking

item.name: Rest API > Booking Management > Update a booking

request.description:
Update booking details or add/remove items from a booking.

**Path parameters:**
- `uniqueId` (string, required) — Unique ID of a booking

**Request body fields:**
- `name` (string, optional) — New title for the booking
- `comments` (string, optional) — Updated detail (max 500 chars)
- `metadata` (object, optional) — Key-value pairs to merge; set value to null to remove
- `newItems` (array, optional) — New booking items to add
- `idsToRemove` (array, optional) — bookingItemIds of items to remove
- `itemsToUpdate` (array, optional) — Booking items to update fields on

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/rest/operations/update-booking

item.name: Rest API > Capacity Reservation > Block resource capacity

body.raw:
{
  "resourceId": 30539,              // (required) ID of the resource to block
  "blockoutCapacity": 10,           // (required) Total capacity to block out
  "date": "2025-07-01",             // (required) Date of the capacity block (ISO8601 yyyy-MM-dd)
  "startTime": "09:00",             // Start time in 24h format (required if blockEntireDay is false)
  "endTime": "17:00",               // End time in 24h format (required if blockEntireDay is false)
  "blockEntireDay": false,          // Whether the block applies to the entire day
  "notes": "Private event"          // Additional notes or reason for the block (optional)
}

request.description:
Block capacity for the specified resource.

**Request body fields:**
- `resourceId` (integer, required) — ID of the resource to block
- `blockoutCapacity` (integer, required) — Total capacity to block out
- `date` (string, required) — Date of the capacity block (yyyy-MM-dd)
- `startTime` (string, required when blockEntireDay is false) — Start time in 24h format
- `endTime` (string, required when blockEntireDay is false) — End time in 24h format
- `blockEntireDay` (boolean, optional) — Whether the block applies to the entire day
- `notes` (string, optional) — Additional notes or reason for the block

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/rest/operations/block-capacity

item.name: Rest API > Capacity Reservation > Delete a capacity reservation

request.description:
Delete a capacity reservation. Use this to clear reserved capacity so other customers may book. Reservations not deleted will automatically expire after 10 minutes.

**Path parameters:**
- `uniqueId` (string, required) — The unique capacity reservation ID

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/rest/operations/delete-capacity-reservation

item.name: Rest API > Capacity Reservation > Delete resource capacity block

request.description:
Delete an existing resource capacity block.

**Path parameters:**
- `blockId` (integer, required) — The unique resource capacity block ID

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/rest/operations/delete-capacity-block

item.name: Rest API > Capacity Reservation > Get resource capacity block

request.description:
Get an existing resource capacity block by its ID.

**Path parameters:**
- `blockId` (integer, required) — The unique resource capacity block ID

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/rest/operations/get-capacity-block

item.name: Rest API > Capacity Reservation > Search resource capacity blocks

query.description: Optional date for which to retrieve capacity blocks (yyyy-MM-dd)
Optional ID of the resource to filter by

request.description:
Search for existing resource capacity blocks.

**Query parameters:**
- `date` (string, optional) — Date for which to retrieve capacity blocks (yyyy-MM-dd)
- `resourceId` (string, optional) — ID of the resource to filter by

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/rest/operations/search-capacity-blocks

item.name: Rest API > Capacity Reservation > Validate and reserve capacity

request.description:
Validate and reserve capacity prior to creating a booking. Use this endpoint to ensure there is no double booking of capacity within ROLLER.

**Request body fields:**
- `items` (array, required) — The products being purchased (booking items)

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/rest/operations/reserve-capacity

item.name: Rest API > Discount > Create discount

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Summer Sale",           // (required) Name of the discount
  "percentOff": 10,               // Percentage off the product cost (use either percentOff or amountOff)
  "amountOff": null,              // Dollar amount off the product cost (use either percentOff or amountOff)
  "productIds": ["153444"],       // Product IDs this discount applies to (empty = all products)
  "startDate": "2025-07-01",      // First day the discount can be used (optional)
  "endDate": "2025-07-31"         // Last day the discount can be used (optional)
}

request.description:
Creates a new discount configuration.

**Request body fields:**
- `name` (string, required) — Name of the discount
- `percentOff` (number, optional) — Percentage off the product cost
- `amountOff` (number, optional) — Dollar amount off the product cost
- `productIds` (array, optional) — Product IDs this discount applies to; empty means all products
- `startDate` (string, optional) — First day the discount can be used
- `endDate` (string, optional) — Last day the discount can be used

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/rest/operations/create-discount

item.name: Rest API > Discount > Create discount codes

request.description:
Creates new discount codes for an existing discount configuration.

**Path parameters:**
- `discountId` (integer, required) — Unique ID of a discount configuration

**Request body fields:**
- `codes` (array, required) — List of codes to add (max 1000 items, each max 32 chars, must be unique across all discounts)

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/rest/operations/create-discount-codes

item.name: Rest API > Discount > Delete discount codes

request.description:
Deletes discount codes from an existing discount configuration.

**Path parameters:**
- `discountId` (integer, required) — Unique ID of a discount configuration

**Request body fields:**
- `codes` (array, required) — List of codes to delete from the discount

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/rest/operations/delete-discount-codes

item.name: Rest API > Discount > Get discount

request.description:
Gets a discount configuration for a given known discount ID.

**Path parameters:**
- `discountId` (integer, required) — Unique ID of a discount configuration

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/rest/operations/get-discount

item.name: Rest API > Discount > Update discount

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Summer Sale Updated",   // Updated name of the discount
  "percentOff": 15,               // Updated percentage off the product cost
  "amountOff": null,              // Updated dollar amount off (use either percentOff or amountOff)
  "productIds": ["153444"],       // Updated product IDs this discount applies to
  "startDate": "2025-07-01",      // Updated first day the discount can be used
  "endDate": "2025-07-31"         // Updated last day the discount can be used
}

request.description:
Updates a discount configuration for a given known discount ID.

**Path parameters:**
- `discountId` (integer, required) — Unique ID of a discount configuration

**Request body fields:**
- `name` (string, optional) — Updated name of the discount
- `percentOff` (number, optional) — Updated percentage off the product cost
- `amountOff` (number, optional) — Updated dollar amount off
- `productIds` (array, optional) — Updated product IDs this discount applies to
- `startDate` (string, optional) — Updated first day the discount can be used
- `endDate` (string, optional) — Updated last day the discount can be used

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/rest/operations/update-discount

item.name: Rest API > Gift Card > Create gift cards

request.description:
Create one or more gift cards for a single gift card product. Each entry in `giftCards` creates one card; all cards are created against a single booking owned by `bookingOwner`. Returns the created gift card numbers in request order; caller-supplied numbers are echoed back, otherwise a number is generated.

**Request body fields:**
- `externalId` (string, required) — External reference, unique per venue; acts as an idempotency key (max 64 chars)
- `productId` (integer, required) — ID of the gift card product to create cards from
- `bookingOwner` (object, required) — Primary contact for the created booking (firstName, lastName, email, phone)
- `giftCards` (array, required) — One entry per card to create (min 1)
- `giftCards[].value` (number, conditional) — Required for open-value products, rejected for fixed-value; must be greater than zero
- `giftCards[].giftCardNumber` (string, optional) — Custom card number (6-128 chars), unique within request and venue; omit to auto-generate
- `giftCards[].recipient` (object, optional) — Recipient name and email (required together), optional message and future deliveryDateTime (UTC)
- `sendConfirmations` (boolean, optional) — Send the booking confirmation to the booking owner
- `sendGiftCardEmails` (boolean, optional) — Send each recipient their gift card email; every card must then have a recipient name and email

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/rest/operations/create-gift-cards

item.name: Rest API > Gift Card > Get gift card balance

request.description:
Get the current balance and details of a gift card by its number. The number is sent in the request body because gift card numbers may contain characters that are unsafe in a URL.

**Request body fields:**
- `giftCardNumber` (string, required) — The gift card code (unique identifier)

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/rest/operations/get-gift-card-balance

item.name: Rest API > Guest > Get guest detail

request.description:
Returns details of a guest record.

**Path parameters:**
- `guestId` (string, required) — ID of a guest record

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/rest/operations/get-guest-detail

item.name: Rest API > Guest > Get guest multi-passes

request.description:
Get a list of guest multi-pass balances including expiry and exhaustion status.

**Path parameters:**
- `customerId` (string, required) — ID of a guest record

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/rest/operations/get-guest-multi-passes

item.name: Rest API > Guest > Get signed waiver

request.description:
Retrieve a waiver signed by a guest.

**Path parameters:**
- `signedWaiverId` (string, required) — Unique ID of the signed waiver record

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/rest/operations/get-signed-waiver

item.name: Rest API > Guest > Update guest detail

body.raw:
{
  "firstName": "Jane",            // Guest's first name
  "lastName": "Smith",            // Guest's last name
  "email": "jane.smith@example.com", // Guest's email address
  "contactNumber": "0412345678",  // Guest's contact phone number
  "dateOfBirth": "1985-06-15",    // Guest's date of birth (yyyy-MM-dd)
  "postcode": "3000",             // Guest's postcode
  "country": "Australia",         // Guest's country
  "acceptMarketing": false,        // Whether the guest accepts email marketing
  "acceptMarketingSms": false      // Whether the guest accepts SMS marketing
}

request.description:
Enables updating the details of a guest record.

**Path parameters:**
- `guestId` (string, required) — ID of a guest record

**Request body fields:**
- `firstName` (string, optional) — Guest's first name
- `lastName` (string, optional) — Guest's last name
- `email` (string, optional) — Guest's email address
- `contactNumber` (string, optional) — Guest's contact phone number
- `dateOfBirth` (string, optional) — Guest's date of birth (yyyy-MM-dd)
- `postcode` (string, optional) — Guest's postcode
- `country` (string, optional) — Guest's country
- `acceptMarketing` (boolean, optional) — Whether the guest accepts email marketing
- `acceptMarketingSms` (boolean, optional) — Whether the guest accepts SMS marketing

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/rest/operations/update-guest-detail

item.name: Rest API > Product > Create stock products

request.description:
Create a new stock product.

**Request body fields:**
- `name` (string, required) — Name of the stock product
- `productCategory` (string, optional) — Product category
- `externalId` (string, optional) — External identifier
- `products` (array, required) — Product variations/children; each must include an `externalId`

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/rest/operations/create-stock-products

item.name: Rest API > Product > Get product availability

query.description: The date (yyyy-MM-dd) availability is needed for (required)
Optional filter — get availability only for products in this category
Optional filter — comma separated parent product IDs

request.description:
Returns products available for a specific date, including capacity and session time information where supported.

**Query parameters:**
- `Date` (string, required) — The date (yyyy-MM-dd) availability is needed for
- `ProductCategory` (string, optional) — Filter by product category
- `ProductIds` (string, optional) — Comma separated parent product IDs to filter by

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/rest/operations/get-product-availability

item.name: Rest API > Product > Get product availability calendar

query.description: The ID of the product to retrieve calendar availability for (required)
The month to retrieve availability for in YYYY-MM format (required)

request.description:
Returns the availability status for each day in a given month for a single product. Designed for use in date picker and calendar UIs to let guests see which dates have availability before selecting a date.

**Query parameters:**
- `productId` (integer, required) — The ID of the product to retrieve calendar availability for
- `date` (string, required) — The month to retrieve availability for (YYYY-MM format)

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/rest/operations/get-product-availability-calendar

item.name: Rest API > Product > Get product detail

query.description: Optional filter — get products in this product category
Optional filter by product type (e.g. Pass, Stock)
Optional filter by product sub type (e.g. Membership)

request.description:
Returns product information for a venue. Response data should be cached as it does not change frequently.

**Query parameters:**
- `ProductCategory` (string, optional) — Filter by product category
- `productType` (string, optional) — Filter by product type
- `productSubType` (string, optional) — Filter by product sub type

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/rest/operations/get-products

item.name: Rest API > Product > Update stock products

request.description:
Update an existing stock product by editing details or creating new variations. All field values must be included in the request (including those not being updated) otherwise they will be overwritten to empty. To update an existing variation, provide the child `productId`. To create a new variation, provide an `externalId` with no `productId`.

**Request body fields:**
- `parentProductId` (string, required) — Parent product ID
- `name` (string, required) — Product name
- `products` (array, required) — Product variations; include `productId` for existing, `externalId` for new

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/rest/operations/update-stock-products

item.name: Rest API > Product > Update stock quantity

request.description:
Update an existing stock product's quantity. Setting `quantity` to `null` sets the stock quantity to unlimited.

**Path parameters:**
- `parentProductId` (string, required) — Unique productId of the parent product

**Request body fields:**
- `productId` (integer, required) — Unique productId of the child product
- `quantity` (integer or null, optional) — The new quantity; set to null for unlimited

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/rest/operations/update-stock-quantity

item.name: Rest API > Redemption > Redeem tickets

request.description:
Redeem tickets in ROLLER. Maximum of 10 ticket redemptions per call. Supported product types: Standard Passes, Session Passes, Recurring Sessions, Memberships.

**Request body fields:**
- `tickets` (array, optional) — List of tickets to redeem; each requires a `ticketId`
- `tickets[].ticketId` (string, required) — ROLLER ticket ID or customTicketId
- `tickets[].redemptionDate` (string, optional) — UTC datetime of redemption; defaults to now
- `redemptionDevice` (string, optional) — Name of the device where tickets are redeemed

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/rest/operations/redeem-tickets

item.name: Rest API > Staff > Create staff

body.raw:
{
  "firstName": "Alex",            // (required) Staff member's first name
  "lastName": "Johnson",          // (required) Staff member's last name
  "email": "alex.johnson@example.com", // (required) Staff member's email address
  "roleId": 1,                    // (required) Role ID to assign to the staff member
  "pin": "1234"                   // Optional POS PIN for the staff member
}

request.description:
Create a staff account.

**Request body fields:**
- `firstName` (string, required) — Staff member's first name
- `lastName` (string, required) — Staff member's last name
- `email` (string, required) — Staff member's email address
- `roleId` (integer, required) — Role ID to assign to the staff member
- `pin` (string, optional) — POS PIN for the staff member

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/rest/operations/create-staff

item.name: Rest API > Staff > Delete staff

request.description:
Delete a staff account.

**Path parameters:**
- `uniqueId` (string, required) — Unique ID of the staff member (UUID)

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/rest/operations/delete-staff

item.name: Rest API > Staff > Get staff

request.description:
Get staff detail for a specific staff member.

**Path parameters:**
- `uniqueId` (string, required) — Unique ID of the staff member (UUID)

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/rest/operations/get-staff

item.name: Rest API > Staff > Lock staff

request.description:
Lock a staff account. Prevents login via email/password and POS PIN.

**Path parameters:**
- `uniqueId` (string, required) — Unique ID of the staff member (UUID)

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/rest/operations/lock-staff

item.name: Rest API > Staff > Send invitation

request.description:
Send an email invitation to a staff member.

**Path parameters:**
- `uniqueId` (string, required) — Unique ID of the staff member (UUID)

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/rest/operations/send-invitation

item.name: Rest API > Staff > Unlock staff

request.description:
Unlock a staff account. Only possible if the staff member's email is verified.

**Path parameters:**
- `uniqueId` (string, required) — Unique ID of the staff member (UUID)

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/rest/operations/unlock-staff

item.name: Rest API > Staff > Update staff

body.raw:
{
  "firstName": "Alex",            // Staff member's updated first name
  "lastName": "Johnson",          // Staff member's updated last name
  "email": "alex.johnson@example.com", // Staff member's updated email address
  "roleId": 1,                    // Updated role ID
  "pin": "5678"                   // Updated POS PIN (optional)
}

request.description:
Update staff details for a specific staff member.

**Path parameters:**
- `uniqueId` (string, required) — Unique ID of the staff member (UUID)

**Request body fields:**
- `firstName` (string, optional) — Staff member's updated first name
- `lastName` (string, optional) — Staff member's updated last name
- `email` (string, optional) — Staff member's updated email address
- `roleId` (integer, optional) — Updated role ID
- `pin` (string, optional) — Updated POS PIN

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/rest/operations/update-staff

item.name: Rest API > Transaction > Add transaction record

body.raw:
{
  "id": "HYA728830013",           // (required) Unique payment/transaction ID
  "paymentType": "CreditCard",    // (required) Tender type: CreditCard, CreditCardPreAuth, Cash, Cheque, BankTransfer, Other
  "amount": 25.5,                 // (required) Payment total including fees (use negative for refunds)
  "creditCardFees": 1.5,          // Credit card fees associated with the payment (optional)
  "transactionDate": "2025-07-01T09:00:00+00:00" // Optional UTC datetime of the transaction
}

request.description:
Add a transaction record (payment or refund) to an existing booking. Payments must be processed externally; only a record of the successful transaction is created via the API.

**Path parameters:**
- `uniqueId` (string, required) — Unique ID of a booking

**Request body fields:**
- `id` (string, required) — Unique payment/transaction ID
- `paymentType` (string, required) — Tender type used
- `amount` (number, required) — Payment total including fees; use negative for refunds
- `creditCardFees` (number, optional) — Credit card fees
- `transactionDate` (string, optional) — UTC datetime of the transaction

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/rest/operations/create-transaction

item.name: Rest API > Transaction > Cancel payment link

request.description:
Cancel a payment link so it can no longer be used to take payment against the booking.

**Path parameters:**
- `uniqueId` (string, required) — Unique ID of a booking
- `paymentLinkId` (string, required) — Unique ID of the payment link

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/rest/operations/cancel-payment-link

item.name: Rest API > Transaction > Create payment link

request.description:
Create a payment link to send to a recipient via email or SMS to take payment. If both email and phone are provided, phone takes priority and an SMS is sent.

**Path parameters:**
- `uniqueId` (string, required) — Unique ID of a booking

**Request body fields:**
- `amount` (number, required) — Amount payable via the payment link
- `email` (string, required if phone not provided) — Recipient email address
- `phone` (string, required if email not provided) — Recipient phone number for SMS

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/rest/operations/create-payment-link

item.name: Rest API > Transaction > Get booking costs

request.description:
Provide a draft booking request and receive associated booking cost information. This will not actually create a draft booking — it only returns relevant booking costs including discounts and gift card deductions.

**Request body fields:**
- `externalId` (string, required) — 3rd party booking reference
- `customer` (object, required) — Booking owner / primary contact
- `items` (array, required) — Products being purchased
- `discounts` (array, optional) — Discount codes to apply
- `giftCards` (array, optional) — Gift cards to apply
- `customerPaysFees` (boolean, optional) — Whether to apply ROLLER fees

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/rest/operations/get-booking-costs

item.name: Rest API > Venue Information > Get NetSuite Settings

request.description:
Returns the NetSuite settings configured for the authenticated venue.

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/rest/operations/get-netsuite-settings

item.name: Rest API > Venue Information > Get venue detail

request.description:
Returns detail of the venue associated with your API keys, including timezone, currency, tax rates, and payment settings.

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/rest/operations/get-venue-detail

item.name: Rest API > Venue Information > Update NetSuite Settings

body.raw:
{
  "accountId": "1234567",          // NetSuite account ID
  "tokenId": "your-token-id",      // NetSuite token ID
  "tokenSecret": "your-token-secret", // NetSuite token secret
  "consumerKey": "your-consumer-key",  // NetSuite consumer key
  "consumerSecret": "your-consumer-secret" // NetSuite consumer secret
}

request.description:
Update the NetSuite settings for the authenticated venue.

**Request body fields:**
- `accountId` (string, optional) — NetSuite account ID
- `tokenId` (string, optional) — NetSuite token ID
- `tokenSecret` (string, optional) — NetSuite token secret
- `consumerKey` (string, optional) — NetSuite consumer key
- `consumerSecret` (string, optional) — NetSuite consumer secret

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/rest/operations/update-netsuite-settings

item.name: Rest API > Webhooks > Create webhook

request.description:
Create a webhook. The `enabled` field must be set to `true` to make it active. At least one webhook type must be configured in the `webhooks` object.

**Request body fields:**
- `url` (string, required) — Endpoint URL to receive webhook events
- `enabled` (boolean, required) — Must be true to activate
- `authentication` (object, optional) — Authentication config
- `webhooks` (object, required) — At least one webhook type (booking, redemption, customer) must be configured

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/rest/operations/create-webhook

item.name: Rest API > Webhooks > Delete webhook

request.description:
Delete an existing webhook.

**Path parameters:**
- `webhookId` (string, required) — ID of a registered webhook

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/rest/operations/delete-webhook

item.name: Rest API > Webhooks > Get webhooks

request.description:
Get information about existing webhooks configured for the venue.

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/rest/operations/get-webhooks

item.name: Rest API > Webhooks > Update webhook

request.description:
Updates an existing webhook configuration.

**Path parameters:**
- `webhookId` (string, required) — ID of a registered webhook

**Request body fields:**
- `url` (string, optional) — Updated endpoint URL
- `enabled` (boolean, optional) — Whether the webhook is active
- `authentication` (object, optional) — Updated authentication config
- `webhooks` (object, optional) — Updated webhook event configuration

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/rest/operations/update-webhook

item.name: Reporting API > Bookings > Get bookings

query.description: The date (yyyy-mm-dd) you need data for (required)

request.description:
Returns detail on bookings and the items/tickets within those bookings based on the booking modified date.

**Query parameters:**
- `startDate` (string, required) — The date (yyyy-mm-dd) you need data for
- `endDate` (string, required) — Should be +1 day from startDate
- `pageNumber` (integer, optional) — Page number (default 1)
- `pageSize` (integer, optional) — Page size (default 100)

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/reporting/operations/get-bookings

item.name: Reporting API > Bookings > Get gift cards

query.description: The date (yyyy-mm-dd) you need data for (required)

request.description:
Returns detail on gift cards based on the gift card modified date.

**Query parameters:**
- `startDate` (string, required) — The date (yyyy-mm-dd) you need data for
- `endDate` (string, required) — Should be +1 day from startDate
- `pageNumber` (integer, optional) — Page number (default 1)
- `pageSize` (integer, optional) — Page size (default 100)

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/reporting/operations/get-gift-cards

item.name: Reporting API > Bookings > Get payments

query.description: The date (yyyy-mm-dd) you need data for (required)

request.description:
Returns detail on payments made against bookings based on the payment date.

**Query parameters:**
- `startDate` (string, required) — The date (yyyy-mm-dd) you need data for
- `endDate` (string, required) — Should be +1 day from startDate
- `pageNumber` (integer, optional) — Page number (default 1)
- `pageSize` (integer, optional) — Page size (default 100)

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/reporting/operations/get-payments

item.name: Reporting API > Bookings > Get tickets

query.description: The date (yyyy-mm-dd) you need data for (required)

request.description:
Returns detail on individual tickets within bookings, based on the booking modified date. Only includes Standard Passes, Session Passes, Recurring Passes, and Memberships.

**Query parameters:**
- `startDate` (string, required) — The date (yyyy-mm-dd) you need data for
- `endDate` (string, required) — Should be +1 day from startDate
- `pageNumber` (integer, optional) — Page number (default 1)
- `pageSize` (integer, optional) — Page size (default 100)

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/reporting/operations/get-tickets

item.name: Reporting API > Customers > Get attendance

query.description: The date (yyyy-mm-dd) you need data for (required)

request.description:
Returns attendance records for guests based on attendance date. Attendance is recorded when a booking item is redeemed. Stock and addon type products are not included.

**Query parameters:**
- `startDate` (string, required) — The date (yyyy-mm-dd) you need data for
- `endDate` (string, required) — Should be +1 day from startDate
- `pageNumber` (integer, optional) — Page number (default 1)
- `pageSize` (integer, optional) — Page size (default 100)

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/reporting/operations/get-attendances

item.name: Reporting API > Customers > Get booking signed waivers

query.description: The date (yyyy-mm-dd) you need data for (required)

request.description:
Returns records of specific waivers/customers and their association with specific bookings/tickets. Use this to link customers to bookings/tickets without them needing to be the booking holder.

**Query parameters:**
- `startDate` (string, required) — The date (yyyy-mm-dd) you need data for
- `endDate` (string, required) — Should be +1 day from startDate
- `pageNumber` (integer, optional) — Page number (default 1)
- `pageSize` (integer, optional) — Page size (default 100)

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/reporting/operations/get-booking-signed-waivers

item.name: Reporting API > Customers > Get customers

query.description: The date (yyyy-mm-dd) you need data for (required)

request.description:
Returns detail on customers based on the customer modified date.

**Query parameters:**
- `startDate` (string, required) — The date (yyyy-mm-dd) you need data for
- `endDate` (string, required) — Should be +1 day from startDate
- `pageNumber` (integer, optional) — Page number (default 1)
- `pageSize` (integer, optional) — Page size (default 100)

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/reporting/operations/get-customers

query.description: The date (yyyy-mm-dd) you need data for (required)

- `startDate` (string, required) — The date (yyyy-mm-dd) you need data for

- `pageNumber` (integer, optional) — Page number (default 1)
- `pageSize` (integer, optional) — Page size (default 100)

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/reporting/operations/get-gx-score-responses

item.name: Reporting API > Customers > Get membership credits

query.description: The date (yyyy-mm-dd) you need data for (required)

request.description:
Returns credits that have been issued against memberships.

**Query parameters:**

item.name: Reporting API > Customers > Get membership redemptions

query.description: The date (yyyy-mm-dd) you need data for (required)

request.description:
Returns membership redemptions for customers based on redemption date.

- `date` (string, required) — The date (yyyy-mm-dd) you need data for
- `bookingReference` (string, optional) — Filter by booking reference

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/reporting/operations/get-membership-redemptions

item.name: Reporting API > Customers > Get membership statuses

query.description: The date (yyyy-mm-dd) you need data for (required)

request.description:
Returns status change log for memberships based on status modified date.

- `date` (string, required) — The date (yyyy-mm-dd) you need data for
- `bookingReference` (string, optional) — Filter by booking reference

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/reporting/operations/get-membership-statuses

item.name: Reporting API > Customers > Get signed waivers

query.description: The date (yyyy-mm-dd) you need data for (required)

request.description:
Returns records of waivers signed by customers.

**Query parameters:**
- `startDate` (string, required) — The date (yyyy-mm-dd) you need data for
- `endDate` (string, required) — Should be +1 day from startDate
- `pageNumber` (integer, optional) — Page number (default 1)
- `pageSize` (integer, optional) — Page size (default 100)

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/reporting/operations/get-signed-waivers

item.name: Reporting API > Revenue > Bulk data export request

header.description: Optional. Set to 'Offset' to use venue timezone in export files instead of UTC

request.description:
Submit a bulk data export request. Once processed, a webhook of type `bulkExport` will be sent to subscribed endpoints containing presigned URL(s) to download the exported data.

**Request body fields:**
- `exportType` (string, required) — Type of data to export
- `startDate` (string, required) — Start date inclusive (yyyy-MM-dd)
- `endDate` (string, required) — End date exclusive (yyyy-MM-dd); must be at least 1 day after startDate

**Request headers:**
- `TimeZone-Designators` (string, optional) — Set to `Offset` to use venue timezone in export files (default is UTC)

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/reporting/operations/bulk-data-export-request

item.name: Reporting API > Revenue > Get revenue entries

query.description: The date (yyyy-mm-dd) you need data for (required)
Comma separated booking IDs to filter by (max 100, optional)

request.description:
Returns revenue entry data relating to funds received and recognised revenue. Date parameters are based on the entry date of the record, not the booking modified date.

**Query parameters:**
- `startDate` (string, required) — The date (yyyy-mm-dd) you need data for
- `endDate` (string, required) — Should be +1 day from startDate
- `pageNumber` (integer, optional) — Page number (default 1)
- `bookingReferences` (string, optional) — Comma separated booking IDs (max 100)

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/reporting/operations/get-revenue-entries

item.name: Reporting API > Venue Information > Get devices

request.description:
Returns detail on POS, SSK and Check In Scanner devices.

- `pageNumber` (integer, optional) — Page number (default 1)
- `pageSize` (integer, optional) — Page size (default 100)

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/reporting/operations/get-devices

item.name: Reporting API > Venue Information > Get discounts

request.description:
Returns detail on all discounts offered. These are not records of discount code usage — they are discount configurations.

**Query parameters:**
- `pageNumber` (integer, optional) — Page number (default 1)
- `pageSize` (integer, optional) — Page size (default 20000)

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/reporting/operations/get-discounts

item.name: Reporting API > Venue Information > Get modifiers

request.description:
Returns detail on all modifiers configured for the venue.

**Query parameters:**
- `pageNumber` (integer, optional) — Page number (default 1)
- `pageSize` (integer, optional) — Page size (default 100)

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/reporting/operations/get-modifiers

request.description:

- `pageNumber` (integer, optional) — Page number (default 1)
- `pageSize` (integer, optional) — Page size (default 100)

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/reporting/operations/get-pos-till-reconciliations

item.name: Reporting API > Venue Information > Get products

query.description: Optional filter by product sub type

Returns detail on all products. Both parent products and child/variation products are returned in a single list.

- `productSubType` (string, optional) — Filter by product sub type

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/reporting/operations/get-products

request.description:
Returns detail on reporting categories configured for the venue.

request.description:
Returns detail on resources (formerly known as locations).

- `pageSize` (integer, optional) — Page size (default 100)

item.name: Reporting API > Venue Information > Get roles

request.description:
Returns detail on roles configured for the venue.

- `pageNumber` (integer, optional) — Page number (default 1)
- `pageSize` (integer, optional) — Page size (default 100)

request.description:
Returns detail on active staff accounts.

- `pageSize` (integer, optional) — Page size (default 100)

Docs: https://docs.roller.app/docs/api/reporting/operations/get-staff

item.name: Reporting API > Venue Information > Get waivers information

request.description:
Returns waiver terms and configuration on active and historic waivers. These are waiver templates, not records of waivers signed by customers — see Get signed waivers for those.
